what: CAMELID_THREADS sweep on Llama-3.2-3B-Q8_0, CPU-only (CUDA hidden), greedy temp=0, byte-identical across all thread counts (parity_all=true).
finding: prefill is compute-bound (scales to logical cores); decode is memory-bandwidth-bound (peaks ~6 threads, degrades past it).

16.note: logical cores; best prefill, worst decode
